enchanting_table.name: Enchanting Table
enchanting_table.notes: Craft after mining obsidian with a diamond pickaxe. Place near bookshelves for higher enchantment levels.

bookshelf.name: Bookshelf
bookshelf.notes: Fifteen bookshelves around an enchanting table unlock level 30 enchants.

diamond_pickaxe.name: Diamond Pickaxe
diamond_pickaxe.notes: Required for mining obsidian. Bring water when mining lava pools.

comparator.name: Redstone Comparator
comparator.notes: Needs quartz from the Nether. Use for container readings, subtraction, and signal comparison.

book.name: Book
book.notes: Lootable from village bookshelves or crafted from paper and leather.

paper.name: Paper
paper.notes: Plant sugar cane near water to scale book production.

stick.name: Stick
stick.notes: Craft from planks or collect from leaf decay.

redstone_torch.name: Redstone Torch
redstone_torch.notes: A compact redstone signal source and comparator ingredient.

stone.name: Stone
stone.notes: Smelt cobblestone in a furnace. Silk Touch also drops stone directly.

obsidian.name: Obsidian
obsidian.notes: Create with water over lava source blocks. Mine with a diamond or netherite pickaxe.

diamond.name: Diamond
diamond.notes: Mine diamond ore in deep overworld caves or branch mines. If you collect Diamond Ore with Silk Touch, smelt it in a furnace to recover diamonds.

diamond_ore.name: Diamond Ore
diamond_ore.notes: Mine with Silk Touch to collect the ore block, then smelt it into a diamond.

leather.name: Leather
leather.notes: Collect from cows, horses, llamas, hoglins, or chest loot.

sugar_cane.name: Sugar Cane
sugar_cane.notes: Find beside water, then farm on dirt or sand adjacent to water.

log.name: Log
log.notes: Chop trees. Any log can become planks.

redstone.name: Redstone Dust
redstone.notes: Mine redstone ore deep underground with iron tier or better.

nether_quartz.name: Nether Quartz
nether_quartz.notes: Mine quartz ore in the Nether. Bring gold armor and blocks.

cobblestone.name: Cobblestone
cobblestone.notes: Mine regular stone without Silk Touch.

fuel.name: Fuel
fuel.notes: Coal, charcoal, logs, planks, lava buckets, and many other items work.
